root: ^Only if your name is Richard Mueller?
^Yes, that's me. What do you want?
^I need to search your house— you're the lead suspect in the case I'm working on. If I don't find anything I'll let you go.
^What? You can't just come into my house. I have rights!
^Yeah you have rights, but I have a warrant.
^This document has incorrect information on it! I am not going to let you into my house.
^Well, I don't care if you let me or not. I'm going to arrest you for non-compliance!
^The vampire pushes open the door, grabs Richard, and gets ready to haul him off.
^The villager struggles, but the two of them leave the property. The door is left wide open.
